name: Maya Carter
bio: Community builder who likes thoughtful messages and ambitious people.

dealbreakers.text: Cruelty, avoidance, and emotional inconsistency are dealbreakers for me.

friendship_preferences.text: I value warm, emotionally fluent friendships where people show up for each other.

relationship_preferences.text: I am looking for a steady, ambitious, emotionally available partner.

communication_style.text: I prefer encouraging, high-context communication with real follow-through.

values.text: Empathy, effort, and consistency matter more to me than surface charm.

lifestyle.text: I like community dinners, meaningful weekends, and social lives with intention.
